title: heterocarpus oligotrichus
intro: Heterocarpus oligotrichus, also known as the 'red-bearded sea cucumber', is a species of deep-sea sea cucumber belonging to the family Heterocarpidae. This species has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in the prevention of cancer cells from growing and inhibiting the development of tumors, due to its bioactive compounds such as terpenoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Heterocarpus oligotrichus include its potential in reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as its ability to protect against neurodegenerative diseases. Herbal preparations of Heterocarpus oligotrichus are often extracted from its body and used in traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
